dataset: Malaysia Business Bank Accounts for MSME

documents_required_general.note: Document requirements vary by bank and business structure. The lists below cover what most Malaysian banks ask for.
sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Initial deposit amount
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners

accounts.best_for: Businesses that need a large branch and ATM network across Malaysia

key_features.initial_deposit: RM1,000 (RM100 via digital transfer for sole proprietors)
key_features.service_charge: RM10 per half-year, waived if monthly average balance is above RM1,000
standout_features: Maybank2u Biz supports bulk payroll uploads of up to 100 payees at once
SME Digital Financing offers loan approvals of up to RM500,000 within minutes for eligible businesses

account_opening_steps: Your account will be created immediately
Activate your account online (for Sole Proprietors, Partnership and Private Limited companies) or visit your preferred branch with the required documents

private_limited_company.note: All documents to be Certified True Copy by Company Secretary
documents: Memorandum and Articles of Association / Constitution / CoSec Confirmation New Act Sec21
Copy of all directors' identity card / passport (if foreigner) and authorised signatories
Form 9 (Certificate of Incorporation of Private Company) / Notice of Registration
Form 13 (Change of Company Name) / Notice of Registration of New Name (if applicable)
Form 24 / Return for Allotment of Shares
Form 49 / Notification of change in the Register of Directors, Managers & Secretaries
Resolution of the Board of Directors to open and operate the account
Initial deposit of RM1,000 upon opening of account
Identity card / passport (if foreigner) of the proprietor / all partners and authorised signatories
Certificate of Registration / Business Registration
Form D (Business License)
Deed of Partnership (for Partnership only)
Letter of Introduction
Mandate Letter
Initial deposit — RM100 minimum via First Party digital transfer (sole proprietors only) OR RM1,000 via account transfer for Partnership / deposit at branch for all business types
Board Resolution / Letter of appointment of authorised signatories
License or Certificate issued by the Registrar of Societies or statutory bodies
Rules and Regulations / By Laws / Constitution
Letter for Bar Council (for Law Firms)
Certificate of Registration of Law Firms (for Law Firms)
Professional Indemnity Insurance Certificate (for Law Firms)
Identification document of Partners, authorised Signatories and Controlling Person (UBO)
Initial deposit of RM1,000 at branch

accounts.best_for: Businesses that require a Shariah-compliant account

key_features.initial_deposit: RM1,000 for Sdn Bhd; RM3,000 for partnerships and LLPs
standout_features: Operates under Islamic finance principles with profit-sharing contracts
Separate Multi Currency Account-i available supporting up to 11 foreign currencies

sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Initial deposit of RM1,000
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners

accounts.best_for: Digital-first SMEs, sole proprietors, and businesses with Malaysian or Singaporean ownership and up to two directors

key_features.service_charge: RM10 per half-year, waived if monthly average balance is above RM1,000
standout_features: Fully digital application with eKYC — no branch visit, no printed forms, no document couriering
Available to Malaysian- and Singaporean-owned businesses
Designed for businesses with no more than two directors or partners

eligibility: All businesses must be registered with SSM
All directors / sole proprietors / partners must be citizens of Malaysia
Must have a sole proprietor or up to 2 partners / directors
SSM report must be updated with the latest list of sole proprietor, partners, directors, shareholders
For businesses with more than 2 partners / directors, apply for MYR Business Current Account instead
account_opening_steps: Have your Business Registration Number (BRN) ready
Fill in the online application form with your business details
Sign digitally or upload your signature(s)
Verify your identity via eKYC portal by scanning front and back of MyKad and taking a selfie video
Receive confirmation email/SMS within 1–2 working days once account is successfully opened
fees_at_opening: OCBC Velocity (Business Internet Banking): Monthly fee waived
OCBC Velocity online training: RM20 (one-time charge)
OCBC OneToken (digital security token): 2 complementary tokens; RM40 for each subsequent token
Half-yearly service charge: RM10 if average account balance falls below RM1,000
documents_required.note: Identity verification is completed digitally via eKYC — no physical document submission required for eligible applicants. Cheque book available upon request at any OCBC branch.

accounts.best_for: SMEs at any stage – from early-stage startups to established businesses – that want an award-recognised banking partner

key_features.service_charge: Half-yearly charge applies if average balance falls below threshold; rebates available when monthly average balance is RM15,000 or above
standout_features: iStart@HLB bundles a business account with financing access and digital tools for new businesses
Named Euromoney's Best SME Bank in Malaysia for two consecutive years (most recently 2025)

sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Initial deposit of RM500
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners

accounts.best_for: SMEs that want their banking connected to accounting, HR, and operational tools

key_features.initial_deposit: RM1,000 for sole proprietors; RM3,000 for companies and other business entities
key_features.service_charge: Half-yearly charge applies if average balance falls below threshold
standout_features: RHB Reflex Premium Plus integrates directly with Financio for accounting
Integration with Kakitangan or Talenox for HR and payroll
Bank transactions, expense tracking, and statutory payments (EPF, SOCSO) manageable from a single platform

documents_required.note: An introducer who is an existing RHB customer is required to provide a declaration as part of the application
sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Introducer declaration from an existing RHB customer
Initial deposit of RM3,000
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners
Introducer declaration from an existing RHB customer

accounts.best_for: New businesses and startups that need a straightforward MYR current account with digital banking access

key_features.service_charge: Half-yearly charge applies if average balance falls below threshold
standout_features: Full access to UOB Infinity and the UOB SME app for account management, payments, and transfers
No-frills option designed for new businesses and startups

documents_required.note: An introducer who is an existing UOB current account holder in good standing is required
account_opening_steps: Verify your identity via the UOB SME App
Click 'Continue on mobile' to proceed to the online form; ensure all applicants complete MyKad verification and review the application
Complete the online form with your business details; you will receive a courtesy call within 1–3 working days after successful submission
Receive an email with your account number; activate the account by completing a DuitNow Transfer
sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories — verified via UOB SME App
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Introducer declaration from an existing UOB current account holder in good standing
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners — verified via UOB SME App
Introducer declaration from an existing UOB current account holder in good standing

accounts.best_for: Businesses that prefer a long-established bank and already have an existing relationship with Public Bank

key_features.initial_deposit: RM500 for sole traders; RM1,000 for companies
key_features.service_charge: RM10 per half-year — no balance-based waiver applies
standout_features: Available to both resident and non-resident business owners
One of Malaysia's longest-running banks (since 1966) with over 250 branches nationwide
Cheque facilities included

introducer_criteria: The introducer can be an individual or non-individual (e.g., company, partnership) with good knowledge of the applicant and must be present at the account opening branch
Must maintain an active Current Account-i with Public Islamic Bank for more than 12 months
Must maintain a good track record without any Internal-Dishonoured Cheques (I-DCHEQS) offence and no frequent representation of cheques
Must not have committed any act of bankruptcy or been subject to any resolution or petition for winding up or insolvency
individuals: Identification document (e.g., MyKad, MyTentera, Passport) of all individuals operating the account

For non-resident individuals: valid work permit and employer confirmation letter, OR valid student pass and referral letter from College/Institute, OR valid Marriage Certificate if married to a Malaysian
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate / Perakuan Pendaftaran (Form D)
Identification document (e.g., MyKad, Passport) of the sole-proprietor or all partners
Business License Forms (2 pages): Business Information / Maklumat Perniagaan (Page 1) and Latest Owner Information / Maklumat Pemilik Masa Kini (Page 2)
private_limited_company_companies_act_20: Section 14 – Application For Registration Of A Company
Section 58 & 236(2) – Notification of Appointment of the First Company Secretary
Company's Constitution (Memorandum & Articles of Association — mandatory for companies limited by guarantee)
Identification document (e.g., MyKad, Passport) of the directors/signatories

Resolution of the Company's Board of Directors (duly certified by Chairman and Secretary) covering: appointment of bank and branch, names and specimen signatures of signatories, mode of operation, authority to overdraw, specimen company stamp, undertaking to notify bank of future changes, authority to transfer funds
private_limited_company_companies_act_19: Certified Copy of Certificate of Incorporation (Form 9) — original to be sighted by bank
Certified Copy of Memorandum & Articles of Association
Certified Copy of Latest Form 24 (Companies Act, 1965) — Allotment of Shares
Certified Copy of Latest Form 49 (Companies Act, 1965) — Particulars of Directors, Managers and Secretaries
Identification document (e.g., MyKad, Passport) of the directors/signatories

Resolution of the Company's Board of Directors (duly certified by Chairman and Secretary) covering: appointment of bank and branch, names and specimen signatures of signatories, mode of operation, authority to overdraw, specimen company stamp, undertaking to notify bank of future changes, authority to transfer funds
limited_liability_partnership: Notice of Registration of the LLP / Perakuan Pendaftaran issued by Registrar of LLP
Register of the names, particulars and address of each Partner and Compliance Officer
Approval Letter from the Professional governing body to form an LLP and a valid Professional Indemnity Certificate (for Professional Practice LLP only)
Identification document (e.g., MyKad, Passport) of the partners/signatories

Resolution passed according to the LLP Agreement OR by majority of partners covering: appointment of bank and branch, names and specimen signatures of authorised signatories, method of signing (mode of operation)

accounts.account_name: Business Current Account / Business Current Account-i
accounts.best_for: SMEs that want hands-on support from a dedicated relationship manager

key_features.service_charge: Half-yearly charge applies if average balance falls below threshold
key_features.account_opening: Doorstep service (relationship manager visits business premises)
standout_features: Doorstep onboarding — relationship manager visits your premises to complete biometric verification
Alliance BizSmart platform with multi-user access, customisable approval limits, and transaction scheduling up to 30 days in advance
Collateral-free SME financing of up to RM1 million via Alliance Digital SME Cash Flow Financing

documents_required.note: Fill in and submit the application form online. An Alliance Relationship Manager will contact you within 1 working day to check documents and schedule biometric IC verification — either at a branch or at your business premises.
account_opening_steps: Prepare supporting documents based on your business entity type
Apply online at alliancebank.com.my and submit the application form
Alliance Relationship Manager contacts you within 1 working day to verify documents and schedule biometric IC verification
Relationship Manager can visit your business premises for on-site verification at your convenience
Deposit minimum RM500 to generate your Alliance BCA account number

sole_proprietorship: Application Form signed by Business Owner
Borang A – Business Certificate of Registration
Borang B – Change of Particulars of Sole Proprietor (if applicable)
Licensing Authority / Practising Certificate (for professionals governed by specific legislation)
partnership: Application Form signed by Partners / Authorised Signatories
Borang A – Business Certificate of Registration
Borang B – Change of Particulars of Partners (if applicable)
Licensing Authority / Practising Certificate (for professionals governed by specific legislation)
llp: Application Form signed by Authorised Signatories
Notice of Registration under Akta LLP 2012
Letter of Authorisation to indicate intention to open account and manner of operating the account
Licensing Authority / Practising Certificate (for professionals governed by specific legislation)
sdn_bhd: Application Form signed by Authorised Signatories
MyKad / Passport for all Authorised Signatories, Identified Beneficiary Owners, and all Directors who are not Authorised Signatories
Certificate of Incorporation
Board / Extract of Resolution
Memorandum & Articles of Association / Constitution (if applicable)
Application of Registration of a Company (if applicable)
List of Directors & Secretary / Notification of Appointment of the first Company Secretary / Notification of Change in the Register of Directors, Managers and Secretaries (if applicable)
Shareholding / Issue & Paid up Capital / Return for allotment of share (if applicable)
Registered Office / Notification of Change in the Registered Address (if applicable)
Certificate of Change of Name (if applicable)
Latest Annual Return (if applicable)
bhd: Application Form signed by Authorised Signatories
MyKad / Passport for all Authorised Signatories, Identified Beneficiary Owners, and all Directors who are not Authorised Signatories
Memorandum & Articles of Association / Constitution (if applicable)
Application of Registration of a Company (if applicable)
Certificate for Commencement of Business (if applicable)
List of Directors & Secretary / Notification of Appointment of the first Company Secretary / Notification of Change in the Register of Directors, Managers and Secretaries (if applicable)
Shareholding / Issue & Paid up Capital / Return for allotment of share (if applicable)
Registered Office / Notification of Change in the Registered Address (if applicable)
Certificate of Change of Name (if applicable)

accounts.best_for: SMEs that want a no-fuss digital business account

key_features.service_charge: Half-yearly, waived if monthly average balance is RM1,000 or above
standout_features: Fully digital account opening via the AmAccess Biz app with no branch visit needed
AmAccess Biz app handles day-to-day payments, transfers, and account management

documents_required.note: All documents submitted digitally via the AmAccess Biz app — no branch visit required
sdn_bhd: Certified SSM company profile / SSM extracts (company info, directors/shareholders, and registered address details)
Company Constitution (if applicable)
Board resolution authorising the account opening and naming authorised signatories
Identity cards (MyKad) or passports for all directors and authorised signatories
Proof of registered business address (tenancy agreement or utility bill)
Business licence or permit (where applicable)
Initial deposit amount (not disclosed)
sole_proprietorship_and_partnership: Business Registration Certificate issued by SSM (or Enterprise Registration)
Identity card (MyKad) of the proprietor or all partners

accounts.best_for: Sole proprietors that want 100% digital banking with no fees and daily interest on balances

standout_features: Malaysia's first digital bank, licensed by Bank Negara Malaysia
Daily interest on balances at 2.50% p.a., calculated daily and posted at end of each day
No minimum balance, no monthly fee, no transaction fees
Biz FlexiLoan provides a credit line of up to RM150,000 with instant approval and 24/7 drawdown
Available to sole proprietors only; apply via GXBank app using MyKad and Business Registration Number

documents_required.note: Available to sole proprietors only. All verification is done digitally via the GXBank app — no branch visit, no paperwork, no initial deposit required.
sole_proprietorship_only: Business Registration Number (BRN) issued by SSM
An existing personal bank account with another bank in Malaysia
Latest 1-month business or personal bank statement used to run daily business operations
